name: Ajumako traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns and dialogue linked to the Ajumako Traditional Area (Central Region). The Ajumako Traditional Council publishes a Queen Mothers roster and titles on its official site (Queen Mothers page at https://efuajumakotcouncil.com/). MBKRU does not represent the Council—always verify facts with official sources.

name: Sunyani traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Sunyani Traditional Area (Bono Region). Public reporting includes University of Energy and Natural Resources (UENR) news on Sunyani Traditional Council leadership and the Paramount Queen Mother (see https://uenr.edu.gh/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Traditional Council.

name: Dormaa traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Dormaa Traditional Area (Bono Region). Public reporting describes the Dormaa Traditional Council led by the Dormaahene alongside the paramount queen mother (Dormaahemaa); see GBC coverage of council leadership at https://www.gbcghanaonline.com/news/dormaa-chiefs-unveil-osagyefo-oseadeeyo-agyemang-badus-20th-anniversary/2019/. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Osudoku traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the Osudoku Traditional Area (Greater Accra / Shai-Osudoku). Ghana News Agency reports on the Osudoku Paramount Queen Mother and the Queen Mothers' Platform of Ghana (https://gna.org.gh/2026/01/osudoku-queenmother-hails-increase-in-allowances-for-traditional-leaders/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Traditional Council.

name: Ngleshie Amanfro traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to Ngleshie Amanfro (Greater Accra). Public reporting covers the Queen Mother of Ngleshie Amanfro in community leadership roles (https://www.ghanaweb.com/GhanaHomePage/regional/Ngleshie-Amanfro-Queen-Mother-recognised-for-leadership-community-service-2035105). Listed among Greater Accra traditional councils by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Shai traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Shai Traditional Area (Greater Accra). The Shai Traditional Council is listed among Greater Accra regional houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). Queen-mother networks operate alongside paramount chiefs in many Ga-adjacent areas—verify current office holders with the Council. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: La traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the La Traditional Area (Greater Accra). The La Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy among Greater Accra houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides a civic channel only—not a substitute for palace or municipal channels.

name: Akwamu traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Akwamu Traditional Area (Eastern Region). Public reporting describes Nana Afrakoma II as Paramount Queen Mother of Akwamu and long-serving traditional leadership at Akwamufie (https://atinkaonline.com/ghanas-longest-serving-paramount-queen-mother-marks-80-years-on-the-throne-in-grand-style/). MBKRU does not represent the Akwamu Traditional Council.

name: Okuapem traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to Okuapeman / the Akuapem Traditional Area (Eastern Region). The Akuapem Traditional Council is listed among Eastern Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/); public reporting regularly references the Okuapem queen-mother role in council affairs. MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Manya Krobo traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Manya Krobo Traditional Area (Eastern Region). The Manya Krobo Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/); Krobo governance includes paramount and divisional queen-mother stools in customary practice. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: New Juaben traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the New Juaben Traditional Area (Eastern Region). The New Juaben Traditional Council is listed among Eastern Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only—not palace representation.

name: Akyem Abuakwa traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Akyem Abuakwa Traditional Area (Eastern Region). The ohemaa (queen mother) institution is central to Akyem Abuakwa customary governance; the council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Ofori Panin Stool or Traditional Council.

name: Nkonya traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Nkonya Traditional Area (Oti Region). Ghana News Agency reports Nana Otubea II as Paramount Queenmother of the Nkonya Traditional Council and president of the All-Regions Queen Mothers Association (https://gna.org.gh/2025/07/queen-mothers-demand-representation-on-national-regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Denkyira traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Denkyira Traditional Area (Central Region). Public reporting describes Nana Ama Saara III as Paramount Queenmother of Denkyira advocating for queen-mother institutions nationally (https://www.graphic.com.gh/news/general-news/ghana-news-establish-house-of-queens-to-champion-womens-devt-queenmothers.html). MBKRU does not represent the Denkyira Traditional Council.

name: Anomabo traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the Anomabo Traditional Area (Central Region). The Anomabo Traditional Council is listed among Central Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides a civic channel only—verify leadership facts with official council sources.

name: Oguaa traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Oguaa Traditional Area (Cape Coast, Central Region). The Oguaa Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Oguaa Traditional Council or Omanhene.

name: Mankessim traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Mankessim Traditional Area (Central Region). The Mankessim Traditional Council is listed among Central Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/); the omanhemaa (queen mother) role is documented in public accounts of the area's governance. MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Juaben (Dwaben) traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Juaben (Dwaben) Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). Dwabenhemaa queens have historically co-governed with the Juabenhene under Asanteman custom; Juaben is among Ashanti paramountcies. Ministry listing: https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Traditional Council.

name: North Tongu traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to North Tongu (Volta Region). Ghana News Agency reports a North Tongu Queenmothers Association engaging national ministries on community programmes (https://gna.org.gh/2026/04/all-regional-queenmothers-association-calls-for-inclusivity-in-decision-making-at-gender-ministry/). MBKRU does not represent any traditional council in the area.

name: Techiman traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Techiman Traditional Area (Bono East Region). Techiman is a major Bono East traditional seat; regional houses of chiefs are catalogued by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only—not palace representation.

name: Twifo traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Twifo Traditional Area (Central Region). The Twifo Traditional Council is listed among Central Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Abura traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Abura Traditional Area (Central Region). The Abura Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Yilo Krobo traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Yilo Krobo Traditional Area (Eastern Region). The Yilo Krobo Traditional Council is listed among Eastern Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Tema traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the Tema Traditional Area (Greater Accra). The Tema Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only—not palace representation.

name: Nungua traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Nungua Traditional Area (Greater Accra). The Nungua Traditional Council is listed among Greater Accra houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Agogo traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Agogo Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). Agogo is among Ashanti paramountcies with queen-mother stools in customary practice; council listed at https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Agogo Traditional Council.

name: Bekwai traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Bekwai Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). The Bekwai Traditional Council is listed among Ashanti Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Mampong traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the Mampong Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). Mampong is a historic Asante paramountcy; Ministry council listing: https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Traditional Council.

name: Goaso traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Goaso Traditional Area (Ahafo Region). The Goaso Traditional Council is listed among Ahafo Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only.

name: Wenchi traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Wenchi Traditional Area (Bono East Region). The Wenchi Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Sekondi traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the Sekondi Traditional Area (Western Region). Sekondi is a major Western Region traditional seat; councils are catalogued at https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Tamale traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Tamale Traditional Area (Northern Region). The Tamale Traditional Council is listed among Northern Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). Queen-mother roles vary by northern custom—verify with official sources. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Bolgatanga traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Bolgatanga Traditional Area (Upper East Region). The Bolgatanga Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only—not palace representation.

name: Sefwi Wiawso traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the Sefwi Wiawso Traditional Area (Western North Region). Traditional councils in Western North are catalogued by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Wa traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Wa Traditional Area (Upper West Region). The Wa Traditional Council is listed among Upper West houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). Queen-mother institutions are being strengthened in some northern areas—verify current office holders with the Council. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Lawra traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Lawra Traditional Area (Upper West Region). Traditional councils in Upper West are catalogued by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only—not palace representation.

name: Damongo traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the Damongo Traditional Area (Savannah Region). The Savannah Region traditional councils are listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Nalerigu traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Nalerigu Traditional Area (North East Region). The North East Region houses of chiefs are catalogued at https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Traditional Council.

name: Ho traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Ho Traditional Area (Volta Region). Ho is a major Volta Region traditional seat; councils are listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only.

name: Keta traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the Keta Traditional Area (Volta Region). The Keta area has long-standing traditional governance along the coast; verify leadership with official sources. Ministry council index: https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Elmina (Edina) traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Edina (Elmina) Traditional Area (Central Region). Elmina is a historic coastal traditional seat; Central Region councils are listed at https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Asebu traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Asebu Traditional Area (Central Region). The Asebu Traditional Council is listed among Central Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Tarkwa traditional governance space
description: Civic space for dialogue linked to the Tarkwa area (Western Region mining district). Western Region traditional councils are catalogued by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU provides civic signposting only.

name: Bechem traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Bechem Traditional Area (Ahafo Region). The Bechem Traditional Council is listed among Ahafo Region houses of chiefs (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Kintampo traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Kintampo Traditional Area (Bono East Region). Kintampo is listed among Bono East traditional councils (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU is independent and does not speak for the Council.

name: Ada traditional governance space
description: Civic space for concerns linked to the Ada Traditional Area (Greater Accra). The Ada Traditional Council is listed by the Ministry of Chieftaincy (https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/). MBKRU does not represent the Council.

name: Offinso traditional governance space
description: Civic space linked to the Offinso Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). Offinso is among Ashanti paramountcies with queen-mother stools in customary practice; Ministry listing: https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU provides civic signposting only.

name: Kumawu traditional governance space
description: Civic space related to the Kumawu Traditional Area (Ashanti Region). Kumawu is a historic Sekyere paramountcy; Ashanti councils are catalogued at https://mcra.gov.gh/regional-houses-of-chiefs/. MBKRU does not represent the Traditional Council.
